ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship package */,
  "sponsorship_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsorship package (e.g., Happy Hour, Backpack) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the sponsorship package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the benefits and perks included in the sponsorship package */,
  "number_available" INTEGER /* Number of available slots for the sponsorship package */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event where the sponsorship is offered */,
  "sponsorship_level" TEXT /* Categorization of the sponsorship package (e.g., Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Detailed description of the benefits included in the sponsorship package */,
  "logo_placement" TEXT /* Locations where the sponsor's logo will be displayed (e.g., event website, email communications, physical items) */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship package (e.g., in-kind, monetary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., DevOpsDays Dallas 2021) */,
  "event_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "event_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "venue_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the event location */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the event */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorship_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship registration */,
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship package that has been claimed */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company claiming the sponsorship */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sponsorship was registered */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used by the sponsor (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the invoice generated for the sponsorship registration */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the sponsorship registration (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event where the sponsorship is registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_registrations_sponsorship_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsorship_id") REFERENCES sponsorships ("sponsorship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Conference Organizer, Sponsor, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Conference Organizer, Sponsor, Admin) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorship_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., logo placement, email promotion) */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the benefit */,
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship package that includes this benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_benefits_sponsorship_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsorship_id") REFERENCES sponsorships ("sponsorship_id")
)
